infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow PresidentsMC to access your photos to upload ride photos and update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow PresidentsMC to use your camera for profile photos and ride photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow PresidentsMC to access your location for ride check-ins and route details.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PresidentsMC to access your photos to upload ride photos, club images, and profile pictures.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PresidentsMC to use your camera for profile photos and ride photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PresidentsMC to access your photos to add them to shared ride albums.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow PresidentsMC to save photos to your library.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow PresidentsMC to access your location for ride check-ins.
